strategy: Target the enemy Copy Qhat (Moon) first. Defeating it shuts off all the endless summoning cheats.
Avoid Myth (68% resist). The boss has almost no other weakness, so use your strongest non-Myth school (Storm gets a slim +5%).
He is stunable and beguilable. A stun or beguile buys safe setup rounds against the summon spam.
Expect copies to keep spawning on both sides until the Moon copy is dead, so use AoEs to clear the board while you set up.
With the summons cut off, blade up and burst the Star boss down.
cheatNotes: Joining after Round 2 gets you hit with a Star Mana Burn, so be in the fight from the start.
The ally Copy Qhat (Moon) on the enemy side casts Bladestorm (+25%) buffing the whole enemy team, another reason to remove it fast.
The Moon copy summons another Copy Qhat (Moon) into any open enemy slot, refilling their side.
It also drops a Copy Qhat (Moon) onto your team's first open slot.
If no Copy Qhat minion is on your team, it summons one whenever a slot opens.
The summoned Copy Qhat overwrites a minion you summoned unless every duel slot is already full.
Defeating the enemy Copy Qhat (Moon) shuts off every one of these summon cheats. Make it your first kill.
